surface_verification.justification: Trivial CI/test-hygiene change: corrected two stale @v3 permission comments in security.yml to @v4 and rewrote test_upload_sarif_action_used to assert the real `uses:` line. No application/Python runtime, no UI, no API/store/SSE surface.

behaviors.behavior: The workflow-shape test asserts the real upload-sarif `uses:` invocation and rejects comment-only mentions
behaviors.evidence: test_workflow_shape.py 14/14 PASSED including the rewritten test_upload_sarif_action_used; the anchored regex '^\s*uses:\s*github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v\d' (MULTILINE) only matches the genuine uses: line (150), never the actions:/security-events: comment lines
